{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "oxqnd", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/122880412?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/oxqnd", "id": 122880412, "login": "oxqnd", "node_id": "U_kgDOB1MBnA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/oxqnd", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-64649", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "## Impact

When a Server Action forwards or redirects a request, an attacker can cause the server to send that outbound request to a malicious host (Server-Side Request Forgery). This requires the attacker's request to control Host-associated headers. In some configurations, it's also possible to obtain internal values that weaken middleware/proxy authorization.

Applications that use Server Actions are affected when the incoming host header is not fixed to a trusted value. This typically occurs on custom servers, or on deployments not behind a proxy that pins the host. Managed hosting pins the host upstream and is not affected; `next start` and standalone output do the same from version 14.2 onward.

## Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade, ensure clients do not control the host header your application receives. Pin or validate `Host` and `X-Forwarded-Host` at your edge or proxy. On version 14.2.0 and later, you can additionally set the `__NEXT_PRIVATE_ORIGIN` environment variable to your deployment's real origin:

```bash
__NEXT_PRIVATE_ORIGIN=https://www.example.com node server.js", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-89xv-2m56-2m9x", "html_url": "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/security/advisories/GHSA-89xv-2m56-2m9x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-89xv-2m56-2m9x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-64649"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-07-21T16:03:06Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/14217083?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/KarimPwnz", "id": 14217083, "login": "KarimPwnz", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE0MjE3MDgz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Server-Side Request Forgery in Server Actions on custom servers", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T16:03:07Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/next.js/security-advisories/GHSA-89xv-2m56-2m9x", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "patched_versions": "15.5.21", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 14.1.1 < 15.5.21"}, {"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "patched_versions": "16.2.11", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 16.0.0 < 16.2.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Server-Side Request Forgery in Server Actions on custom servers
